<!--
  Thanks for contributing to Elk! 💛
  Please fill in the sections below and tick the checklist before opening your PR.
-->

## Description

<!-- In your own words, what does this PR change, and why? Link any related issues (e.g. "Closes #123"). Please don't paste an LLM-generated summary. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I understand every change in this PR and take responsibility for it — including any parts written with AI help
- [ ] I wrote this PR description in my own words, and the PR title follows [Semantic Pull Request](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/#summary) (see successful PRs for examples).
- [ ] `pnpm test:unit` passes (snapshots updated if needed)
- [ ] `pnpm test:typecheck` passes
- [ ] _(Recommended)_ I [signed off](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#signing-off-your-work-recommended) each commit myself (e.g., using `git commit -s`)

<!--
IMPORTANT: Used an AI coding agent for any part of this change? 🤖👋
- That's welcome — but you still need to read, understand, and take responsibility for every edit an agent made before it lands here. See the our guidance for [AI-assistance](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#using-ai-assistance) for the details. Thanks for keeping Elk in good hands!
-->
